# ProfileCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BundleId

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object ProfileCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BundleId
```

## Objects

- **ProfileCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BundleId.Data**: The type and ID of the resource that you’re relating with the resource you’re creating.

## Objects

- **ProfileCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.Certificates**: The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.
- **ProfileCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.Devices**: The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.
